query:
SELECT 
  t.id, 
  t.title,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN tr.targetLanguage = 'en' THEN 1 END) as en_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN tr.targetLanguage = 'en' THEN tr.fieldName END ORDER BY tr.fieldName) as en_fields
FROM tours t
LEFT JOIN translations tr ON tr.entityType = 'tour' AND tr.entityId = t.id
WHERE t.status = 'active'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY t.id
LIMIT 20;

FROM tours t
LEFT JOIN translations tr ON tr.entityType = 'tour' AND tr.entityId = t.id
WHERE t.status = 'active'
